name: Sweet & Sour Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes. Cook them in a Dutch oven in boiling salted water until tender, then drain and cool.
2. Cube the cooled potatoes. Add the chopped eggs, pickles, celery seeds, mustard, salt, pepper, and dressing to the potatoes. Mix gently.
3. Refrigerate the salad for 24 hours to allow flavors to develop.
4. Garnish with parsley sprigs before serving, if desired.
5. To make the dressing: Place egg yolks and sugar in a small saucepan. Gradually add vinegar, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
6. Remove from heat, stir in butter, then chill. Add mayonnaise and mix well.
7. Yield: about 2-1/4 cups
Note: This recipe is from Southern Living Magazine, July 1980.
